---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report missing, incorrect, or confusing documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Location

Which file or section is affected? (e.g. `docs/s3.md`, `README.md #Configuration`)

## Problem

What is wrong, missing, or confusing in the current documentation?

## Suggested Improvement

What should the documentation say or include?

## Additional Context

Any other context or screenshots.
